subject: fix(mobile): hide page management when bottom sheet is open
body:
Canvas was squeezed between the ContextBar's page management row and
the bottom sheet, leaving barely any room to see the design while
editing. The pages row (thumbnails, add/duplicate/delete/move) isn't
needed during active editing — cell selector and undo/redo suffice.

Added compact prop to ContextBar that hides the pages row on mobile.
Passed from App.jsx as compact={mobileSheetOpen} so pages auto-hide
when the bottom sheet opens and reappear when it closes.

Tags: mobile, ux, layout, bottom-sheet
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-layout
Semver: patch
